title: Apache Spark Interview Mastery
desc: 12 interactive modules covering RDDs, DataFrames, architecture, performance tuning, Spark UI, optimization, lakehouse, structured streaming, and 200+ real interview questions.

title: Scala Interview Mastery
desc: 8 modules from basics to Spark integration — case classes, pattern matching, collections, concurrency, implicits, and a final battle plan.

title: Real-Time Streaming Mastery
desc: Kafka architecture, exactly-once semantics, Schema Registry, Kafka Connect, Apache Flink, watermarks, state management — from core concepts to interview-ready.

title: Cloud AWS Mastery
desc: S3, Glue, Athena, EMR, Kinesis, Redshift, Lake Formation, Step Functions — complete AWS data engineering coverage for interviews.

title: dbt Mastery
desc: 8 modules from core concepts to production — models, materializations, incremental strategies, testing, snapshots, Jinja macros, CI/CD, and interview scenarios.

title: SQL & Databases Mastery
desc: Window functions, CTEs, recursive queries, query optimization, PostgreSQL internals, NoSQL essentials — from fundamentals to interview-ready.

title: Backend Services Mastery
desc: FastAPI, Pydantic, REST APIs, microservice patterns, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring — full backend engineering for interviews.

title: AI & ML Foundations
desc: ML fundamentals, deep learning, NLP, transformers, scikit-learn pipelines, PyTorch, Hugging Face — from basics to interview-ready.

title: LLMs & GenAI Mastery
desc: LLM fundamentals, prompt engineering, RAG architecture, LangChain, LangGraph, AI agents — 7 modules from transformers to production agents.

title: MLOps & AI Infrastructure
desc: MLOps pipelines, model serving, LLMOps, fine-tuning LLMs — experiment tracking, deployment, monitoring, and production ML systems.

title: System Design — Data Engineering
desc: Design data platforms, real-time CDC pipelines, batch systems — end-to-end architecture scenarios with tradeoff discussions.

title: System Design — AI/ML
desc: Design RAG systems, fraud detection, search ranking, AI agents, ML platforms — 9 full system design problems with solutions.

title: Data Modeling Interview Mastery
desc: Star schemas, SCDs, Data Vault, modern patterns, lakehouse modeling — everything interviewers ask about dimensional modeling.

title: Data Quality Interview Mastery
desc: Quality dimensions, data contracts, anomaly detection, schema drift, quarantine patterns, testing strategies, and real-world failure modes.

title: Cost Optimization Interview Mastery
desc: Partitioning, shuffle reduction, small files problem, backfill estimation, FinOps metrics, join optimization, and cluster management.

title: Data Governance Interview Mastery
desc: RBAC vs ABAC, PII handling, GDPR compliance, data catalogs, retention policies, masking, tokenization, and audit strategies.

title: DSA & Coding Mastery
desc: Arrays, hashmaps, trees, graphs, DP, sorting, heaps, plus DE-specific coding (Pandas/Spark) and SQL coding problems.

title: Behavioral & Leadership
desc: STAR method, communication, project management, incident management — prepare compelling stories for behavioral rounds.

title: Agentic RAG Masterclass
desc: Build a production multi-agent RAG chatbot — LangGraph orchestration, hybrid search, cross-encoder reranking, Redis memory, and Docker deployment. 65 interview Q&As grounded in real code.
